title: rubus heterophyllus
intro: Rubus heterophyllus, also known as the Western thimbleberry, is a species of thimbleberry that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus heterophyllus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Rubus heterophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
